description: Led end-to-end development of 'Wheel Deals', a high-scale automotive marketplace. Engineered a robust ecosystem spanning mobile, backend, and cloud infrastructure.
achievements: Designed and developed a scalable Spring Boot backend handling 5,000+ active users, managing complex vehicle/dealer workflows and transaction pipelines.
Implemented secure media upload & processing for car videos (up to 500MB), reducing average latency by ~35% through async processing and background jobs.
Built real-time dealer–user chat and inventory updates using WebSockets, supporting hundreds of concurrent connections with minimal latency.
Containerized services with Docker and deployed on AWS, achieving sub-200ms average API response time and improving deployment consistency.
Created automated CI/CD workflows using GitHub Actions and managed VPS security with custom firewall and rate-limiting rules.

description: Developed cross-platform mobile applications for the aerospace and defense sector, focusing on high-performance, secure, and scalable solutions for critical operations.
achievements: Built secure mobile applications for defense-grade systems
Implemented offline-first architecture for mission-critical apps
Integrated native device features and sensors for real-time telemetry
